SPACEMERCS-EXERT.description: This card costs 1 [rainbow]Determination[/rainbow] instead of energy if you have [rainbow]Determination[/rainbow].
SPACEMERCS-EXERT.title: Exert
SPACEMERCS-GAINSHUNGER.description: Gain Energy equal to stacks now and at the start of your next turn. Shuffle that many [gold]Voids[/gold] into your draw pile.
SPACEMERCS-GAINSHUNGER.title: Hunger
SPACEMERCS-GAINSSCORCH.description: When the creature reaches [blue]10[/blue] stacks, it [color=orangered]Ignites[/color], dealing [blue]30[/blue] damage to it and [blue]15[/blue] to all other enemies. If no stacks are applied to the creature during your turn, the enemy loses half its stacks.
SPACEMERCS-GAINSSCORCH.title: Scorch
